title: galatella sedifolia subsp. illyrica
intro: Galatella sedifolia subsp. illyrica is a subspecies of the Galatella sedifolia plant, also known as the Illyrian Galatella, a flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Galatella sedifolia subsp. illyrica include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and combat infections.
